notes: Two-leg GBPUSD/GBPJPY market-neutral FX cointegration candidate from the 2026-06-09 66-pair scan rerun. It did not clear the original hard survivor bar and has negative DEV Sharpe plus very low OOS Sharpe, but it is the strongest remaining unbuilt OOS-positive pair after the existing 12532/12533/12624/12712/12723/12728/12731/12732/12735/12739/12747/12749/12751/12756/12758 baskets.
Q02 uses USD tester currency and the canonical RISK_FIXED=1000 budget. The EA selects GBPUSD/GBPJPY plus USDJPY conversion history.
